title: Time registration on/off for everyone, but edit for a some selected people.
excerpt: Turning on time registration should be available for everyone to turn on. But only for some selected people also possible to be able to adjust the history of time registration.

posts.author: Berto (Berto)
posts.cookedHtml: Turning on time registration should be available for everyone to turn on. But only for some selected people also possible to be able to adjust the history of time registration.
